title: sisymbrium mariolense
intro: Sisymbrium mariolense, also known as Mariola hedge mustard, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Sisymbrium mariolense include its ability to aid in digestion and alleviate respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce fever. The plant can be prepared as a decoction or tincture, and it is often used in herbal medicine to treat a range of ailments.
